M-073.NAME: premium-public-site
M-073.path: frontend/src/App.tsx frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx frontend/src/index.css frontend/src/pages/Login.tsx frontend/src/pages/Register.tsx frontend/src/pages/ForgotPassword.tsx frontend/src/pages/ResetPassword.tsx frontend/src/pages/VerifyEmail.tsx frontend/src/pages/Landing.tsx docs/plans/Phase-56.xml docs/plans/Phase-62.xml docs/plans/Phase-67.xml scripts/phase56-premium-public-auth-smoke.mjs scripts/phase62-compactness-deletion-smoke.mjs scripts/phase67-auth-splash-smoke.mjs
M-073.owns: Phase-67 public splash entry, auth, registration, verification, and password recovery surfaces.
M-073.purpose: Present KrotPN public/auth access as a compact premium Matrix entry while keeping registration and email verification clear.

exports.view-public-entry: Splash-only KrotPN logo animation on / with automatic redirect to /login and no marketing/tariff/product content.
exports.view-premium-auth: Compact premium login/register/reset/verify screens with logo and clear state feedback.
exports.view-tariff-preview: Historical Phase-56 public preview removed from / by Phase-67; M-068 remains the tariff catalog owner for authenticated subscription surfaces.

constraints.constraint-1: Do not issue or imply VPN, trial, JWT, referral, or MTProto access before verified email proof.
constraints.constraint-2: Public visual effects must not slow or obscure registration, reset, or verification forms.
constraints.constraint-3: Tariff information must not return to / unless a later approved phase changes the Phase-67 splash-only contract.

acceptance-metrics.metric-1: Frontend build passes and public/auth route smoke covers mobile, tablet, desktop, and reduced-motion.
acceptance-metrics.metric-2: Registration pending and duplicate-email recovery states remain clear and token-safe.
acceptance-metrics.metric-4: Public value and tariff feature detail copy is folded while registration CTA, email-proof copy, reset, verify, and tariff clarity remain visible.

phase-67-verification-design.scope: Replace the current public landing presentation with a splash-only logo redirect and retune login/register/forgot/reset into frameless premium Matrix auth surfaces.
phase-67-verification-design.copy-contract: Use Кибернетический Протокол Навигации as the auth eyebrow/title replacement, Вход в KrotPN, Присоединиться к KrotPN, and Назначить пароль where requested; remove the operator-listed helper paragraphs and above-field labels while preserving accessible names.
phase-67-verification-design.route-contract: / must redirect to /login after the logo animation; /login, /register, /forgot-password, and /reset-password must preserve current API calls, pending/check-email state, duplicate-email recovery, password example, reset-token handling, and auth state boundaries.
phase-67-verification-design.negative-contract: No visible matrix-auth-card frame, no framed logo lockup, no public marketing/tariff detail on /, no stale hidden copy, no changed backend/auth/billing/VPN/MTProto/deploy behavior.

execution-evidence.local-2026-06-03: Phase-56 added the public / landing route, moved authenticated user cabinet routes under /dashboard with legacy redirects, added visible logo lockups to auth flows, added compact public tariff preview verified against M-068, added scripts/phase56-premium-public-auth-smoke.mjs, passed frontend build, Phase-44/46/50/52/53/55 regression smokes, captured Chrome screenshot matrix in /tmp/krotpn-phase56-screenshots, passed XML/MyGRACE/diff checks, and kept deploy/install/backend/VPN/MTProto/billing runtime surfaces untouched.
execution-evidence.local-2026-06-04-phase62: Phase-62 folded secondary public feature/tariff details, preserved email-proof and auth clarity, and passed frontend build, Phase-56 smoke, Phase-62 smoke, Phase-60/61 regressions, XML parse, MyGRACE lint, git diff check, and protected backend/deploy/runtime guard.
execution-evidence.local-2026-06-04-phase67: Phase-67 superseded the Phase-56 public landing with a splash-only / redirect to /login, removed visible auth card frames and requested helper/label copy from login/register/forgot/reset, preserved registration pending/check-email, password example, duplicate-email recovery, reset-token handling, and passed Phase-67 plus Phase-56/60/61/62/63 regressions.

M-073.hotspot: H-060: Public/auth premium presentation must not delay registration, hide verification states, or imply access before email proof.
